LAW AND MOTION 302, MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT, ARGUED AND THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING (MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT DENIED. MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION GRANTED AS TO THE 1ST CAUSE OF ACTION FOR BREACH OF CONTRACT, THE 2ND CAUSE OF ACTION FOR BREACH OF THE IMPLIED COVENANT, AND THE 5TH CAUSE OF ACTION FOR SECTION 17200, AS IT IS NOT OPPOSED. MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION GRANTED AS TO THE 6TH AND 7TH CAUSES OF ACTION FOR DISCRIMINATION, AS PLAINTIFF'S DO NOT MEET THEIR BURDEN OF PRODUCING EVIDENCE OF DISCRIMINATION. MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION DENIED AS TO THE 3RD CAUSE OF ACTION FOR FRAUD, THE 4TH FOR PROMISSORY ESTOPPEL, THE 8TH FOR NEGLIGENCE, AND THE 9TH FOR NEGLIGENT MISREPRESENTATION AS THERE ARE TRIABLE ISSUES OF FACT).
